meaning: n.阴暗,阴沉v.(使)变阴暗,优伤地说,繁荣
examples: Why are people so full of gloom and doom?
The flashlights barely penetrated the gloom.
"I wish I did," said Phil Jordan, relapsing into his usual gloom.
Now, in the jungle gloom of my Siem Reap hotel room, a glimmer of understanding grew.
"But around the world, there are things happening, it's not all doom and gloom, " he added.
